_comment: Real-wiring example. Point `proven.bin` at your CLI install dir, add a `command` source per tool that can emit a JSON array, and `files` sources for your notes/repos. Tip: run `foundations init` to auto-generate this from what's installed on your machine, or copy ready-made blocks from presets/ (ats, rzq, memory, repos). Save as foundations.config.json or export FOUNDATIONS_CONFIG=/path/to/this.json. Absolute paths recommended for a real setup.

sources.name: tasks
sources.why: tasks are intentions you noted, not validated working
sources._validate_comment: Optional: a command that, when it exits 0, promotes a hit to PROVEN via `foundations prove tasks:<id>`. {item}/{id}/{query} are substituted. Omit it and the lead simply stays a claim.

sources.name: content
sources.why: live content; assertions not independently validated

sources.name: notes
sources.why: prior knowledge, may be stale; verify before relying

sources.name: repos
sources.why: source is present, not confirmed to run/work
